items.item: All code passes TypeScript strict mode compilation with zero errors
items.verification: CI pipeline runs `tsc --noEmit` and blocks merge on failure

items.item: All code passes ESLint with the project's @taskflow/eslint-config configuration with zero warnings
items.verification: CI pipeline runs `eslint --max-warnings 0` and blocks merge on failure

items.item: Unit test coverage for changed files meets or exceeds 80% line coverage
items.verification: Vitest coverage report checked in CI, coverage gate enforced

items.item: All acceptance criteria have at least one corresponding automated test (unit, integration, or E2E)
items.verification: PR checklist includes AC-to-test mapping reviewed by QA

items.item: All existing tests pass (zero regressions) in CI pipeline
items.verification: GitHub Actions CI must show green on all test suites before merge

items.item: API endpoints have OpenAPI/Swagger documentation with request/response examples
items.verification: Fastify auto-generates OpenAPI spec; reviewed during PR

items.item: Complex business logic has inline code comments explaining the 'why' (not the 'what')
items.verification: Code reviewer checks for clarity during PR review

items.item: No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials in source code
items.verification: GitHub secret scanning enabled; `gitleaks` runs in CI pipeline

items.item: All user inputs validated with Zod schemas before processing
items.verification: PR review checks that all route handlers use schema validation middleware

items.item: New UI components meet WCAG 2.2 Level AA color contrast requirements (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text)
items.verification: Axe accessibility audit runs in E2E tests; contrast checker in design review

items.item: All interactive elements are keyboard accessible with visible focus indicators
items.verification: Manual keyboard navigation test during QA; Playwright focus tests for critical flows

items.item: API endpoints respond within p95 < 200ms for CRUD operations (tested with realistic data volume)
items.verification: k6 performance tests run weekly; regression alerts in Datadog

items.item: Pull request has at least 1 approving review from a team member other than the author
items.verification: GitHub branch protection rule enforces required reviews

items.item: Feature is deployable behind a feature flag if it affects existing functionality
items.verification: Feature flag configuration reviewed in PR for any user-facing changes
